reviews.text: Their work holds true to their name.. my house was truly spotless after they finished. Super satisfied customer!

reviews.text: Alina did a wonderful job!

reviews.author: Erica Avallone
reviews.text: Their work holds true to their name — my house was truly spotless after they finished. Super satisfied customer!

reviews.author: Penny
reviews.text: Very well done. Attention to detail. Outstanding job on luxury vinyl floors with scuffs. Missed the shower panel, but I have great confidence that future cleanings will be perfect. Put molding that broke loose (it was already very loose) in a prominent place for us to find and fix.  Windows cleaned on the inside. Pleasant person, good communicator.

reviews.author: Penny
reviews.text: Excellent attention to detail. Very hard working. Cordial, eaisily understood, good communicator0.

reviews.author: GEORGINA BAEZ
reviews.text: She did a wonderful job, thank you for the refreshing,  on time hard work and great results 😁

reviews.author: Siena Poyfair
reviews.text:
The house was immaculate when we got home. The attention to detail was incredible and we were just so happy with the results. I feel really lucky having found this company online and it can feel like a risk trying new cleaners but let me put your mind at ease this is the company to go with.

I also have to say their communication was so wonderful and smooth.

reviews.author: Nancy Ionoff
reviews.text: Tatiana did an excellent job!  Everything is perfect.  Very pleasant, really knows how to clean.  A pleasure!

reviews.text: Tatiana is very thorough and diligent in her work

reviews.author: Silvana Capaldi
reviews.text: Tatiana did an excellent job!

reviews.author: Penny
reviews.text: Attention to detail. Outstanding job on luxury vinyl floors with scuffs. Pleasant person, good communicator.

reviews.author: Jason Carey
reviews.text: Very good and thorough! The house smells and looks amazing! Katerina did a fantastic job!

reviews.author: Kai Pope
reviews.text: They were fast and very thorough! They cleaned my walls, baseboards, closet doors, blinds, ceiling fans and oven. I have used 2 other cleaning companies and were very disappointed and fired them. These ladies were incredible! I will continue to use them.

reviews.author: Pat Sanderson
reviews.text: Pays attention to detail, thorough and my house looks great! She is very nice and friendly, we have bonded!!

reviews.author: Raquel
reviews.text: We have tried many cleaning services and this one is the best

reviews.author: Jenn Gardner
reviews.text: Wonderful cleaning service with a superior attention to detail. I’ve tried four other services since I moved to Tampa and this is by far the best. I will be a loyal customer. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Milena
reviews.text:
Amazing service

The cleaner did a fantastic job — everything was spotless and exceeded my expectations. The pricing is very affordable, especially for the quality of work. Professional, reliable, and incredibly thorough. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a great cleaner!

reviews.author: Vicki W
reviews.text:
I have used many cleaning services in my time, and Spotless Homes is hands down an absolute top notch cleaning service!  If you are tired of being let down from other cleaning services, Spotless Homes will blow you away!  Our house literally sparkles after Larisa has been here!  Her attention to detail is second to none!  We love her!  I want you to feel as lucky as I do for finally finding a cleaning services you will love and can depend on!
Spotless Homes and Larisa S get 10 stars from this very satisfied customer!  Call them asap!  You will not be let down or disappointed!
🌟 🌟 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

reviews.text: Amazing service every time! They do a great job and are polite and understanding.

reviews.text: Alina did an amazing job cleaning my home! I highly recommend her

reviews.author: Christopher haynes
reviews.text: Mariana did an incredible job!!!! I’d highly recommend her and this company! She was on time and went the extra mile for sure in getting my home absolutely spotless!!!

reviews.author: Blake Seals
reviews.text: Phenomenal work! Hired for cleaning out and they hit top to bottom. Would recommend and hire again!

reviews.author: B
reviews.text: Lara is AMAZING! Spotless when she leaves. Professional and kind ❤️

reviews.author: Tracy Leone
reviews.text: Tanya and Laura did an amazing job and communicated well. Thank you!

reviews.author: Amanda Jennings
reviews.text: Theyre wonderful! My house is extremely clean and well definitely be having them back! Nice and professional!

reviews.author: Zach Nicolaou
reviews.text: Spotless Homes is amazing! I couldn’t be happier with the deep clean they did for me. My oven looks brand new, the kitchen was sparkling, and every bedroom and bathroom was left spotless. The attention to detail was next-level—corners, baseboards, and all the little things most cleaners overlook were taken care of perfectly. It truly felt like walking into a fresh, new home. If you’re looking for reliable, professional cleaners who go above and beyond, Spotless Home is the one. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jessica Martinez
reviews.text:
Im so greatful for this service. I have a busy schedule and had reached out a few months ago but unfortunately our calendars didn’t align and I got carried away. They had the most professional, kind lady reach out and text me asking if I’d like to use their services and I did. She made it so easy to schedule and my bathrooms are sparkling clean. They sent me updates and priced me at a fair point. I love how convenient and effect this team is! Will deff be recommending and using them again!!!

Thank you guys!! I can’t wait to take a bubble bath in freshly cleaned tub!

reviews.author: Zach Nicolaou
reviews.text: Corners, baseboards, and all the little things most cleaners overlook were taken care of perfectly. Felt like walking into a fresh, new home.

reviews.author: Griffin Wallace
reviews.text: On time- precise- very communicative- pictures of before and after. They did great, I own rental properties here in Jacksonville and will be using them again

reviews.author: Stephanie and Tommy Hintzman
reviews.text:
We had our home cleaned yesterday by Spotless Homes, and we were genuinely impressed with the experience from start to finish. Our main point of contact was Kate, who was super easy to work with—professional, responsive, and made the whole process stress-free. She scheduled everything quickly and clearly explained what to expect.

The cleaning team, Tatiana and Larisa, were fantastic. Our home was honestly in rough shape—it needed some serious attention. They showed up on time, got right to work, and didn’t miss a beat. They were focused, efficient, and incredibly thorough. We could tell they took pride in what they were doing, which really meant a lot to us.

By the time they were done, the house looked and felt completely different. Floors were spotless, surfaces shined, and everything smelled fresh and clean without being overly perfumed.We really appreciated how detailed they were and how respectful they were of our home.

If you're looking for a reliable and hardworking cleaning team, We would definitely recommend Spotless Homes.

reviews.author: aa o
reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We’ve had a great experience with Spotless Homes! George is always easy to reach by text and super responsive, even with last-minute scheduling needs. The team does a fantastic job—our condo is always spotless between tenants, and we’ve never had a single complaint. Reliable, communicative, and consistently high-quality service. Highly recommend Spotless Homes to anyone looking for dependable cleaners!

reviews.author: Virginia Vela
reviews.text:
Spotless Homes came today and did a deep cleaning on my home. I could not be happier! Larissa did a fantastic job. Everything sparkles! You cannot believe how she scrubbed and cleaned my oven. The kitchen cabinets look new again.  The whole house looks spectacular!
I’ve decided to hire them on a permanent basis every two weeks. I highly recommend Spotless Homes.  You will not be disappointed!

reviews.author: Jayme Hill
reviews.text: Could not recommend more. We use Spotless home for our regular deep cleans and they always do a fantastic job! We recommend them to everyone!

reviews.author: Anastasia
reviews.text: Great service! Super friendly and very detail-oriented. My home looks amazing

reviews.author: Victoria Apria
reviews.text: Quick, professional, and spotless every time. Highly recommend!☀️🎉😍

reviews.author: Катя «Katrine» Катя
reviews.text: The most thorough deep clean we’ve had—our home feels brand new😊

reviews.author: Елена Макеева
reviews.text: Impressively thorough deep cleaning that made the entire home feel revitalized

reviews.author: Svetlana Ponomarev
reviews.text: Very pleased with the cleaning! Everything is clean, neat and with attention to detail. A pleasant and responsible person. We recommend!"

reviews.author: Лариса Злыдарь
reviews.text: Reliable, thorough, and professional. I use their bi-weekly cleaning plan and love how consistent the results are. It’s such a relief to have a trusted local cleaning company take care of my home so well.

reviews.author: Татьяна Ковтун
reviews.text: So impressed with Spotless Homes! I’ve tried a few local cleaning companies, but this was by far the best experience. The team was right on time, super friendly, and left my home sparkling clean. It’s such a relief to come home to a fresh space every time. Highly recommend their recurring cleaning service!

reviews.author: Татьяна Лиманская
reviews.text: Incredible service! The cleaners were thorough, professional, and very respectful of my home and pets. I signed up for bi-weekly cleanings and it’s been one of the best decisions I’ve made. If you're looking for reliable house cleaning services in Jacksonville, look no further!

reviews.author: Михаил Макеев
reviews.text: Spotless Homes did a deep cleaning for my older property, and they went above and beyond. My kitchen and bathrooms have never looked better! The attention to detail is what makes them stand out. I’ll definitely be booking a recurring plan. Best home cleaners in the area!

reviews.author: Carolyn Jones
reviews.text:
Spotless does such a great job.  We appreciate the service they provide.
They are prompt to answer questions and they work well on my elderly parents home.  They are the best. I chose them because of their great customer service. I work 48 hours a week and their service is valuable.

reviews.author: Aubrie Appel
reviews.text: There was one person doing a deep clean that finished in less than the 3.5 hours that I was quoted! I’ve never better pricing either! Thank you for also washing my dishes which I hate doing. Did a fantastic job!

reviews.author: Joey Rao
reviews.text: Very nice people and a very good job. Very impressed.

reviews.author: Jordan Mossorofo
reviews.text: Gregory and his team at Spotless Homes have been doing a wonderful job cleaning our Airbnb in between guests and keeping us updated with any issues that may arise and need attention. I would recommend you give them a call if you are in need of a reliable cleaning.

reviews.author: Ann Marie malave
reviews.text:
Spotless Homes offers a five star experience. They are readily accessible, highly accommodating to your schedules and the staff diligently ensure that your vacation rentals thoroughly clean to prepared for the next guest .
George’s exceptionally kind enthusiastic about enhancing your experience.

reviews.author: Nadja Haltonen
reviews.text: Highly recommend.Left my home spotless

reviews.author: Ольга Нечаева
reviews.text: had the pleasure of working with this cleaning service recently, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with their service! From the very beginning, their team was professional, responsive, and incredibly thorough. They deep cleaned my home, and every corner was spotless. I was especially impressed with how they took care of my furniture and ensured everything was cleaned with eco-friendly products.

reviews.author: Dmitriy
reviews.text: I had an amazing experience with this cleaning service! They were punctual, thorough, and even managed to tackle some stubborn areas I didn’t think could be cleaned. My home now feels incredibly fresh and perfectly organized—it’s like stepping into a brand-new space. I’ll absolutely be scheduling another appointment!

reviews.author: Denis Makieiev
reviews.text: Great job. I like it. Fast and effective. I will order their service again.

reviews.author: Nikolai Mironenko
reviews.text: This guys are the keepers. I have been struggling with a bad service from dozens companies for years until I found this guys. There're on top of their duties: always on time, clean up the corners I didn't even know existed at my place , they leave everything spotless and always are very attentive to my needs and instructions. Spotless Homes you're my best now. Thank you for making my life easier and my home super clean and organized!

reviews.author: Natalia Giannatasio
reviews.text: Spotless Homes is fantastic! From our first phone call to the helpful reminders before each service, the team is professional, friendly and well-organized. They clearly outline the services they offer while remaining flexible, treating your home with the utmost care as if it were their own. Working with them is truly a pleasure.

reviews.author: Elena Vesselova
reviews.text: Spotless Homes are excellent! From our initial phone conversation to reminders of upcoming service, The guys are professional, friendly, organized, outlines services and yet is flexible, treats your house as hers and is a delight to work with. You won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Denis Zaitsev
reviews.text: Spotless Homes and their team were incredibly quick and efficient. My home now looks and smells impeccably clean. After today's service, I’ve decided to hire them for weekly cleanings!

reviews.author: Stanislav Manjilevskiy
reviews.text: I have had an excellent experience with Spotless Homes. Their attention to detail is remarkable, and I love the decorative touches they add to the toilet paper — it truly shows they go above and beyond. I highly recommend their services to everyone.
